schema.title: Response Get Me Tasks Api V1 Me Tasks Get
Response Get Me Rewards Api V1 Me Rewards Get

InterestFormBody.title: InterestFormBody
InterestFormBody.description:
POST /tasks/{id}/submit body for tasks with form_type == 'interest'
(task 1).

JoinRequest.title: JoinRequest
JoinRequest.description:
A pending/approved/rejected request to join a team. Visible to
the team's leader and to the requester themselves.

MeProfileCreateResponse.title: MeProfileCreateResponse
MeProfileCreateResponse.description:
Response body for POST /me/profile. Returned atomically with the
profile completion and led-team creation.

MeTeamsResponse.title: MeTeamsResponse
MeTeamsResponse.description:
Response body for GET /me/teams. Named envelope over an inline
dict so TS codegen and FastAPI share one OpenAPI schema.

NewsItem.title: NewsItem
NewsItem.description: A single entry in the home-screen news carousel.

ProfileCreate.title: ProfileCreate
ProfileCreate.description:
Request body for POST /me/profile (first-time profile completion).
Side effect on the backend: user's led team is created in the same
transaction.

ProfileUpdate.title: ProfileUpdate
ProfileUpdate.description:
Request body for PATCH /me. Partial update; all fields optional.

Setting a field to ``null`` clears it; empty strings are rejected.
Fields omitted from the request are left unchanged.

Task.title: Task
Task.description:
User-facing task view. Server-side merge of the global task
definition and the caller's per-user state.

TaskStep.title: TaskStep
TaskStep.description: One step in a task's checklist. `done` reflects the caller's state.

TaskSubmissionResponse.title: TaskSubmissionResponse
TaskSubmissionResponse.description:
Response body for POST /tasks/{id}/submit.

`reward` is null when the task has `bonus is None`.

Team.title: Team
Team.description:
Full team view.

`role` reflects the caller's relationship to the team (leader /
member / None for outsiders). `requests` is populated only when the
caller is the leader; members and outsiders see `None`.

Aggregate points (all-time / week) live in the leaderboard view —
not on the team row. The team size cap (currently 6) is a property
of the T3 challenge task def (``TaskDefRow.cap``), not stored here.

TeamChallengeProgress.title: TeamChallengeProgress
TeamChallengeProgress.description:
Aggregate progress for a team-challenge task.

`total = max(led_total, joined_total)` — the higher of the caller's
led-team or joined-team head count (server-computed).

TeamLeaderboardEntry.title: TeamLeaderboardEntry
TeamLeaderboardEntry.description: Single entry in the team leaderboard.

TeamRef.title: TeamRef
TeamRef.description: Thin team embedding for leaderboard entries and search results.

TeamUpdate.title: TeamUpdate
TeamUpdate.description:
Request body for PATCH /teams/{id} (leader only). All fields
optional for partial update.

Setting a field to ``null`` clears it where the column is nullable;
empty strings are rejected. Fields omitted from the request are
left unchanged.

TicketFormBody.title: TicketFormBody
TicketFormBody.description:
POST /tasks/{id}/submit body for tasks with form_type == 'ticket'
(task 2).

User.title: User
User.description: Authenticated caller's profile. Returned by GET /me.

UserLeaderboardEntry.title: UserLeaderboardEntry
UserLeaderboardEntry.description: Single entry in the user leaderboard.

UserRef.title: UserRef
UserRef.description: Thin user embedding (id + display_id + name + avatar_url).
